title: onobrychis peduncularis subsp. eriophora
intro: Onobrychis peduncularis subsp. eriophora, also known as Eriophorum, is a plant species in the pea family Fabaceae, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It possesses medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of isoflavones and other bioactive compounds, which contribute to its therapeutic potential. Eriophorum has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including menopausal symptoms, osteoporosis, and cardiovascular diseases, due to its estrogenic and antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its health benefits, which may also include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects.
